scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:storefront && npm run typecheck:admin
scripts.qa: npm run lint:storefront && npm run lint:admin && npm run typecheck && npm run build:storefront && npm run build:admin && npm run test:api
scripts.qa:e2e: npm run build:storefront && npm run build:admin && node scripts/ensure-postgres.mjs && node scripts/clear-next-dev-locks.mjs && node node_modules/playwright/cli.js test
scripts.qa:e2e:headed: npm run build:storefront && npm run build:admin && node scripts/ensure-postgres.mjs && node scripts/clear-next-dev-locks.mjs && node node_modules/playwright/cli.js test --headed
scripts.qa:e2e:ui: npm run build:storefront && npm run build:admin && node scripts/ensure-postgres.mjs && node scripts/clear-next-dev-locks.mjs && node node_modules/playwright/cli.js test --ui
